description_long: This is a large, modern two-story house with a flat roof and a striking geometric design, featuring a mix of white, gray, and dark wood exterior panels. The house is set within a rectangular plot with manicured green lawns and includes a prominent swimming pool and patio area at the front. Expansive floor-to-ceiling windows and glass railings provide a sense of openness and allow natural light to flood the interior spaces. The structure incorporates multiple balconies, terraces, and outdoor living areas, as well as a driveway leading to a garage. The rear and side elevations reveal additional private green spaces and a variety of window shapes and placements. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor living.
description: A large, modern two-story house with flat roofs, expansive glass windows, a swimming pool, and a mix of white, gray, and wood exterior panels. The design features open terraces, balconies, and a landscaped yard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, swimming pool, patio, and extensive use of glass and wood panels.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the white exterior walls, private green space, and the rear of the pool area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the driveway, garage entrance, and a central water feature in the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view revealing additional terraces, balconies, and the integration of the pool with the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and glass railings
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a wide staircase, glass doors, and a covered porch area integrated with the pool patio.
